title: No More Modern Crafts
description: Modify recipes closer to beta Minecraft.
body:
Modify recipes to be closer to beta Minecraft.

* Remove non-oak wood variants of some blocks.
* Remove non-red bed crafts.
* Added Enchantmed apple craft.
* Old fence recipe.
* And more!

Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/MvrwfmMcud).
